title: CV2 Resetting to the Factory Default
description:
CV2 Resetting to the Factory Default

Resetting to the Factory Default

Settings for the CV2 can be reset to the factory default.

Following settings are reset by this function.

IP address setting

Local monitor setting

Setting for projects saved to the CV2

For instance, if you lost the IP address which you previously changed, you can check it by connecting the PC monitor to the CV2.  If there is no problem to reset the setting, you can also restore the IP address to "192.168.0.3" by resetting the CV2 to the factory default.

To initialize the CV2 to the factory default, follow the steps below.

Turn OFF the CV2.

Turn ON the CV2 while pressing the TRIGGER switch on the front side of the CV2 (refer to Part Names and Functions).

Release the TRIGGER switch when the STATUS LED on the front side of the CV2 starts blinking quickly (approx. 3 times/sec).

The CV2 automatically restarts after the STATUS LED stops blinking and the STATUS LED blinks five times quickly.

After the CV2 is restarted, initialization completes.
